item: Fresh-clone setup and all gates succeed.
Live GPT-5.6 path works with a server-side key and fixture replay works without one.
Developer Tool installation, supported platforms, and a direct judging path are documented.
Git history distinguishes substantive work after 2026-07-13 and the README distinguishes pre-existing GraphReFly from Build Week work.
Final bundle records exact model ID, commit SHA, schema and prompt versions, artifact hashes, and all five case verdicts.
Primary implementation task has a /feedback Session ID.
Category and project description are final.
Public YouTube demo is under three minutes, includes voiceover, and explains Codex and GPT-5.6 usage.
Repository URL, setup, sample-data, and judging-path instructions are complete without asking judges for credentials.
Official rules are rechecked and the Devpost entry is final before BW-D1.
